title: Stock market today: Dow rises, S&P 500, Nasdaq fall as tech rotation trade resumes, US-Iran tensions flare
description: Dow +0.2%, S&P 500 -0.3%, Nasdaq ~-1%. Tech rotation resumed. Apache helicopter shot down over Strait of Hormuz. CPI preview: consensus 4.2% YoY.

title: Stock market news for June 9, 2026 — S&P 500, Nasdaq close lower; Dow ends higher
description: S&P 500 7,386.65 (-0.26%), Nasdaq 25,678.82 (-0.97%), Dow 50,872.11 (+0.17%). 301 S&P stocks advanced despite index decline. SMH -1%.

title: AI Semiconductor Stocks Selloff June 2026: $1.4T Crash Analysis
description: SOXX plunged 10% on June 6, erasing $1.4T. Broadcom -12.6%, Marvell -17%. Rotational not structural. Jensen Huang called it a buying opportunity.

title: Chip Sector Suffers Worst Single-Day Collapse In Six Years As Marvell and Micron Lead Losses
description: SMH -10% on June 6, worst since March 2020. Marvell (MRVL) -17% after Jensen Huang had called it 'the next trillion-dollar company'.

title: Inflation could top 4% this week. The bond market wants Fed Chair Warsh to prove he'll fight it.
description: 2Y Treasury yields surged to ~4.15% above the Fed's 3.50-3.75% band. '$31 trillion Treasury market has an unequivocal message: rates aren't high enough.' — Jack McIntyre, Brandywine Global

title: Oil Prices On June 10: Brent Crude Edges Higher From Seven-Week Low To $92 As US Strikes Iran
description: Brent +0.9% to $92 in early trade June 10 after settling at $91.45 (lowest since Apr 17). US helicopter shot down by Iran over Strait of Hormuz triggered US self-defense strikes.

title: OpenAI confidentially files for initial public offering on US stock market
description: OpenAI submitted confidential S-1 to SEC. Valued at $852B. Not profitable. CEO Sam Altman outlined three goals including AGI for everyone. Sora shut down April 2026.

title: OpenAI files confidential SEC S-1 paperwork for IPO
description: OpenAI joins Anthropic and SpaceX in AI IPO race. CFO Sarah Friar: 'I want us to be ready to tap public markets.' Altman met with Sen. Bernie Sanders on public ownership stakes.

title: SpaceX targets $135 IPO price at valuation of $1.77 trillion
description: SpaceX fixed $135/share price. $75B raise, 555.6M shares. 2x oversubscribed. Institutional books close June 10, pricing June 11, trading June 12 (Nasdaq: SPCX).

title: CoreWeave Faces Fresh Insider Selling Scrutiny
description: Founders sold $2.3B since lockup expired. CSO Brian Venturo sold >$1.1B, second-largest insider seller YTD. Stock doubled since March 2025 IPO.

title: Strategy's bitcoin purchase fails to stir BTC price: Crypto Markets Today
description: MSTR bought 1,550 BTC for $101M, total holdings 845,256 BTC. BTC price failed to react. Bearish signal for crypto sentiment.

title: Oracle Sets Date for Q4 FY2026 Earnings — June 10 After Close
description: ORCL Q4 FY2026 earnings June 10 after close. BofA Buy, PT raised to $240. FY2026 revenue expected +17% to $67.3B (S&P Global).

title: May CPI Preview: Energy Prices Could Push Inflation Above 4%
description: Dean Baker (CEPR): Headline CPI 0.7-0.8% MoM, ~4.3% YoY. Core 0.3-0.4% MoM, 3.0% YoY. Gasoline +7% in May. Rental inflation normalizing from BLS error distortion.

title: US Inflation Update — May 2026 CPI Preview
description: MUFG forecasts headline CPI 0.47% MoM / 4.2% YoY, core 0.28% MoM / 2.9% YoY. Upside risk: renewed Iran tensions. 2Y sell-off if core >0.3% MoM.

title: US 10 Year Treasury Note Yield — Quote, Chart, Historical Data
description: 10Y at 4.53% June 10. 2Y at 4.14%. Fed funds 3.75%. 2Y above Fed funds signaling further tightening. December rate hike probability ~70%.
